title: BibleDesk
tagline: A clean, distraction-free Bible reading and study web app.
description: BibleDesk is a minimal, fast web application for reading, searching, and annotating scripture — with a clean reading mode, verse bookmarking, personal notes, and offline support via a local-first data model.
story: Every Bible app I tried was cluttered with ads, push notifications, and UI patterns lifted from social media. I wanted something that felt like opening a physical book — quiet, focused, and fast. BibleDesk is that.
forWho: People who want to read and study the Bible without distractions, on any device, without an account required.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Static Astro site with client-side Bible data loaded from JSON. IndexedDB stores bookmarks, notes, and reading progress locally — no backend required.
keyPatterns: JSON Bible data with book/chapter/verse structure
IndexedDB via idb wrapper for typed local storage
Service Worker for full offline capability
